en: Please answer the questions in the section below with regards to your entire company.
Injury & Incident Information
Injury & Incident Information
Please indicate the total number of employees for the given year for your entire company. This should include all office locations and business units globally.
What is the total _number of employees_ for the given year. Approximate if necessary.
When calculating the total number of hours worked by all employees, any extra hours worked such as additional shifts and overtime should be included.
What is the total _number of hours_ worked by all employees for the given year?
All workplace accidents and occurrences that resulted in a <u>fatality</u>, <u>lost time</u>, <u>restricted work</u>, and/or <u>medical treatment</u> should indicate a "Yes" answer.
Did your company experience _any_ occupational injuries or incidents for the given year?
No
Yes
Any workplace injury or incident that resulted in an employee death.
How many _fatalities_ were there for the given year?
Any workplace occurrences that resulted in a permanent disability or time lost from work of one day or more.
How many _lost time_ injuries/incidents were there for the given year?
The total number of complete working days lost from work as a result of a lost time injury/incident.
How many _days_ were lost from work for _lost time_ injuries/incidents for the given year?

Any workplace occurrences that resulted in a disability where the employee was unable to follow their ordinary occupation but instead performed alternate or light duty; and/or put on restricted work/hours.
How many _restricted work_ injuries/incidents were there for the given year?
No
Yes
The total number of complete working days where an employee performed alternate/light duty (or put on restricted work/hours) as a result of a restricted work injury/incident.
How many _days_ were restricted from work for _restricted work_ injuries/incidents for the given year?
Any workplace occurrences which were <u>not</u> classified as lost time or restricted work injuries/incidents and required more than basic first aid administered to the injured employee.
How many _medical treatment_ injuries/incidents were there for the given year?
Avetta uses the following formula to calculate your employee's weekly hours:\n(Total Hours Worked ÷ Total Employees ) ÷ 52 week

### High Workhours

Are your hours and/or employee count entered correctly? The total number of hours reported are considerably *HIGHER* than the average weekly hours typically worked by full-time employees.

Please validate that you have entered your correct employee count and/or total hours. If correct, provide a brief explanation for approval (this will be visible to your client connections). Otherwise, please correct your answers.
Avetta uses the following formula to calculate your employee's weekly hours:\n(Total Hours Worked ÷ Total Employees ) ÷ 52 week

### Low Workhours

Are your hours and/or employee count entered correctly? The total number of hours reported are considerably *LOWER* than the average weekly hours typically worked by full-time employees.

Please validate that you have entered your correct employee count and/or total hours. If correct, provide a brief explanation for approval (this will be visible to your client connections). Otherwise, please correct your answers.
